title: Squirtle Squad-R
description: adds both glasses to cobblemon squirtle!
body:
REPLACED WITH [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-visual-tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-visual-tweaks) (1.7+)
- Squirtle Squad

- replaces original model

- cobblemon resource pack for squirtle

- adds a round glasses variant as the default, and a spiky glasses variant as the shiny

- uses the pointy glasses from [RedRibbonz](https://modrinth.com/user/RedRibbonz) [Poke_Costume](https://modrinth.com/datapack/poke-costume/gallery)

- uses cobblemon squirtle model as a base [https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon-assets/-/tree/master/blockbench/pokemon/gen1/0007_squirtle](https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon-assets/-/tree/master/blockbench/pokemon/gen1/0007_squirtle)
